# BestChiropractorUSA

> A directory of verified chiropractors across the United States with practice details, specialties, hours, and contact information.

## About
BestChiropractorUSA is a comprehensive chiropractor directory featuring detailed profiles for licensed chiropractors. Each listing includes the doctor's credentials, practice address, phone number, office hours, specialties, services offered, and a professional bio.

## Directory Listings
Each chiropractor has a dedicated profile page at /chiropractor/{slug} with structured data (JSON-LD) for search engines and AI systems.

## About
- [About BestChiropractorUSA — Our Mission & Editorial Standards](/about)

## Condition Pages
Each condition page lists chiropractors who specialize in treating that condition, with structured data (JSON-LD) using MedicalCondition schema.

- [Back Pain](/conditions/back-pain)
- [Neck Pain](/conditions/neck-pain)
- [Headaches & Migraines](/conditions/headaches-migraines)
- [Sciatica](/conditions/sciatica)
- [Sports Injuries](/conditions/sports-injuries)
- [Prenatal Chiropractic](/conditions/prenatal-chiropractic)
- [Pediatric Chiropractic](/conditions/pediatric-chiropractic)
- [Auto Accident Injuries](/conditions/auto-accident-injuries)
- [Family Wellness](/conditions/family-wellness)
- [Holistic Pain Relief](/conditions/holistic-pain-relief)

## State Pages
Each state page lists all chiropractors located in that state, with structured data (JSON-LD) using ItemList schema.

- [Connecticut](/states/connecticut)
- [Georgia](/states/georgia)
- [California](/states/california)
- [Florida](/states/florida)
- [Colorado](/states/colorado)
- [Michigan](/states/michigan)
- [Ohio](/states/ohio)
- [Kentucky](/states/kentucky)
- [Oregon](/states/oregon)
- [Texas](/states/texas)
- [Tennessee](/states/tennessee)
- [Illinois](/states/illinois)
- [Louisiana](/states/louisiana)
- [South Carolina](/states/south-carolina)
- [Missouri](/states/missouri)
- [Virginia](/states/virginia)
- [Kansas](/states/kansas)
